metadata.title: Oxford English Primary 3 (Shanghai Edition)
metadata.subtitle: 牛津上海版小学英语三年级下册

unit1.name: Seeing and hearing
unit1.topic: 学习视觉和听觉相关词汇，包括交通工具

sentences.english: Look! I can see a bus.
sentences.chinese: 看！我能看到一辆公共汽车。

sentences.english: I can see a ship and a train.
sentences.chinese: 我能看到一艘轮船和一列火车。
画一个圆圈，然后剪下来。

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Look! I can see a plane.

unit2.name: Touching and feeling
unit2.topic: 学习触觉和感觉相关词汇

sentences.english: Feel the pineapple. Is it rough or smooth?
sentences.chinese: 摸摸菠萝，它是粗糙的还是光滑的？

sentences.english: Feel the bread. Is it hard or soft?
sentences.chinese: 摸摸面包，它是硬的吗还是软的？

sentences.english: I want some bread and water, please.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Feel the pineapple. Is it rough or smooth?

unit3.name: Tasting and smelling
unit3.topic: 学习味觉和嗅觉相关词汇

sentences.english: Taste the lemon. Is it sweet or sour?
sentences.chinese: 尝尝柠檬，它是甜的还是酸的？

sentences.english: Smell the coffee. Is it nice?
Sometimes it is sweet. Sometimes it is sour.
sentences.chinese: 有时候它是甜的，有时候它是酸的。

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Taste the lemon. Is it sweet or sour?

unit4.name: Animals
unit4.topic: 学习动物园里的动物名称和描述

sentences.english: I like tigers. They are clever.
sentences.chinese: 我喜欢老虎，它们很聪明。

lines.speaker: Kitty
lines.text: I like tigers. They are clever.

sentences.chinese: 我们一起做一个玩具吧。

sentences.english: Sorry, I can't find my kite.
sentences.chinese: 对不起，我找不到我的风筝了。

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Good idea! I have some foil and glue.

sentences.english: I need a pair of gloves.
Hurry up! Don't miss the bus.
sentences.chinese: 快点！不要错过公共汽车。

lines.speaker: Kitty
lines.text: And this is my new hat.

sentences.english: How many sides does a triangle have?
Let's draw a house after school.
sentences.chinese: 放学后让我们画一个房子吧。

unit8.name: Colours
unit8.topic: 学习各种颜色和相关自然词汇

sentences.chinese: 我喜欢色彩鲜艳的图片。

dialogues.title: Dialogue 1: What colour do you like?

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: What colour do you like, Ben?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: I like blue. What about you?

unit9.name: Seasons
unit9.topic: 学习季节和活动相关词汇

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Look at the sky. It's blue.

unit11.name: My day
unit11.topic: 学习出行和活动相关词汇

lines.speaker: Kitty
lines.text: Good idea! I like the park.

unit12.name: Three little pigs
unit12.topic: 学习和讲述三只小猪的故事

sentences.english: Once upon a time, there were three little pigs.
The first pig built a house of straw.
sentences.chinese: 第一只小猪建了一座稻草房子。

sentences.english: The second pig built a house of sticks.
sentences.chinese: 第二只小猪建了一座树枝房子。

sentences.english: The third pig built a house of bricks.
sentences.chinese: 第三只小猪建了一座砖头房子。

sentences.english: The wolf blew down the houses.
The third pig was very clever.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Once upon a time, there were three little pigs.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: They wanted to build their own houses.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The first pig built his house with straw.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The second pig built his house with sticks.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The third pig worked hard and built a strong house of bricks.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: A big bad wolf came. He blew down the first house.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: He blew down the second house too.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: But he couldn't blow down the third house.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The three little pigs were safe. They lived happily ever after.

exercises.question: 第一只小猪用什么建房子？

basic.question: There ___ a book on the desk.
There ___ some cats in the room.
Don't ___ late.
basic.explanation: 祈使句否定Don't后接be动词原形。

improved.question: There ___ not ___ milk in the glass.
___ the boy ___ his homework?
improved.explanation: 一般疑问句：Does he do...? 谓语用原形。

improved.question: The ball is ___ the box and the chair.
My bag is ___ the table ___ the chair.
___ he at home? No, he ___ at school.
Open the door, ___ you?
improved.explanation: 祈使句的反意疑问句用will you。

basic.question: There ___ (be) a cat in the box.
There ___ (be) two books on the table.

improved.question: There ___ (be not) any water in the cup.
There ___ (be) a boy and two girls in the room.
improved.hint: 就近原则，靠近be动词的是a boy

improved.question: The book is ___ the desk. (in front of)

basic.statement: There is a book on the desk.
basic.question: ___ there a book on the desk?

basic.statement: The cat is on the table.
basic.question: Where ___ the cat?

improved.statement: There are some books in the bag.
improved.question: ___ there ___ books in the bag?

improved.statement: The ball is between the boxes.
improved.question: Where ___ the ball?

improved.statement: There is some milk in the glass.
improved.question: ___ there ___ milk in the glass?

improved.statement: My bag is under the chair.
improved.question: Where ___ your bag?
